top_signals.title: Russian Oreshnik missile fired in January was nine years old, Ukrainian experts say
top_signals.summary: The Oreshnik, which Russia first used against ‌Ukraine ‌in 2024, is a nuclear-capable missile with a range of over ​5,000 kilometers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Zijin faces delays to its $4bn swoop for Allied Gold - Financial Times

top_signals.title: Commission approves €9 billion Spanish capacity mechanism for security of electricity supply
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 29 May 2026 The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €9 billion capacity mechanism for electricity supply for Spain. This aid measure aims to ensure that there is sufficient capacity to produce, store or flexibly consume electricity and that electricity production meets the expected demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
